title: How Harry Styles, Lily Allen and other stars are helping grassroots artists
description: Ticket money from some stadium and arena gigs is helping support struggling grassroots artists and venues.
content:
At the end of their gigs, up-and-coming Norwich country-rock band Brown Horse jump from the stage to their merchandise stall.
Selling T-shirts often earns them more money than the show itself.
That income is crucial to keeping them afloat on the road... [4884 chars]

title: Palantir under fire for X 'manifesto' from co-founder Alex Karp
description: The boss of the controversial tech company with UK government contracts published a 22-point plan on the future of the West.
content:
It's not often a thousand-word social media post from a US tech firm goes viral.
But the post from Palantir - a 22-point manifesto of sorts - currently has over 30 million views on X.
It is the work of the controversial company's co-founder and chief... [5783 chars]

title: Kamonnan Thiamphanit: Man charged with murder after extradition from UAE
description: Kamonnan Thiamphanit, 27, who was also known as Angela, was stabbed in Westminster in 2024.
content:
A man has been extradited to the UK from the United Arab Emirates and charged with the murder of Kamonnan Thiamphanit, 27, who was stabbed in Westminster in 2024, the Metropolitan Police say.
Enzo Bettamio, 18, was put on a flight from Dubai to the U... [292 chars]

title: Europe's Nato allies push back at reported US threat to Spain
description: On Friday morning, souring relations between Europe and the United States reared its Medusa-like head again, writes the BBC's Europe editor.
content: It's become a joke - through gritted teeth - these days in EU circles, that whenever leaders meet, as they did these last two days in Cyprus - expecting to discuss practicalities, such as the new EU budget - they get railroaded by yet another crisis.... [11774 chars]

title: King's 'high stakes' visit with Trump will be toughest test yet of his reign
description: The state visit to the US looks fraught with difficulty - but could be key to rescuing the special relationship.
content:
"It's high risk, high stakes and high opportunity."
That's how a royal source describes next week's state visit by King Charles III and Queen Camilla to the United States.
There is genuine jeopardy in this US trip. It's not just a grip-and-grin photo... [10958 chars]
